mnemonics.title: DMA Steps
mnemonics.content: DMA: 1) Device Requests, 2) CPU Grants, 3) Data Flows, 4) Interrupt Confirms

mnemonics.title: Interrupt Handling
mnemonics.content: ISR Steps: Save, Serve, Restore (SSR) - like Server restart sequence

acronyms.usage: Code executed when hardware interrupt occurs
Critical interrupts that cannot be ignored

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a highway bypass road going directly from device city to memory city, avoiding CPU town
Picture hospital emergency triage - critical patients (interrupts) get treated first

analogies.analogy: Like constantly checking your mailbox for a package instead of getting a delivery notification
Acts like a personal assistant who handles package deliveries so you can focus on important work
